{{nihongo|'''Niiya Nimasu Amateru-mitama Shrine'''|新屋坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Niiya Nimasu Amateru-mitama Shrine'''|新屋坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

| mapframe = yes

| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Niiya Nimasu Amateru-mitama Shrine'''|新屋坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Niiya Nimasu Amateru-mitama Shrine'''|新屋坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Niiya Nimasu Amateru-mitama Shrine'''|新屋坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Niiya Nimasu Amateru-mitama Shrine'''|新屋坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].
